w:r.w:t: The app loads and core auth flows work. The primary blockers are: (1) no market data in the database, causing cascading UI failures, and (2) a few missing/broken page routes. The analysis-service and market-service are both deployed and healthy on Railway.
Market Overview shows "No market data available" on every page load
historical_prices table in Supabase is empty — market-service /api/refresh has never been called to seed it
"Failed to load market data" banner on homepage
/api/market-data returns 404 when Supabase historical_prices is empty — frontend shows error banner
"Failed to create transaction" when adding investment in guest mode
Guest mode has no Supabase session; the /api/investments route requires auth. Expected behavior unclear — should guest mode support local-only adds?
"Try as Guest" button on homepage does nothing
Button click does not navigate to /dashboard or set guest session — appears to be missing onClick handler or router.push()
No page exists at /stock-screener. Quick Actions button links to this route but the page was never built
Route exists in app/transactions/page.tsx but navigating directly returns 404. Possible build/export issue or missing auth redirect logic
Portfolio Analysis requires sign-in even in guest mode
Auth middleware redirects all unauthenticated users to sign in. Guest mode users can't access this feature at all
analysis-service URL still uses old Railway domain (web-production-08b88)
The service was repurposed from an old 'web' service — the URL works but the domain name is confusing and may change if the service is redeployed under a new name
market-service has not been triggered — no price data in DB
The market-service /api/refresh endpoint must be called at least once (or on a schedule) to populate historical_prices. No cron job or trigger is configured

Call POST https://[market-service-url]/api/refresh with x-api-key header. Then set up a Railway cron job to call it daily. This will populate historical_prices and fix the Market Overview and homepage banner.
In app/page.tsx, add router.push('/dashboard') to the 'Try as Guest' button onClick handler and set a guest session flag in localStorage or context.
Either: (a) store guest investments in localStorage and show them in the UI without saving to DB, or (b) show a 'Sign in to save' prompt instead of an error when the transaction fails.
Create app/stock-screener/page.tsx. Can use the /api/market-data endpoint to show searchable price data. Or remove the Quick Actions button if not planned.
Verify app/transactions/page.tsx exists and builds correctly. Check middleware.ts — the route may be blocked by auth redirect. Add it to the guest-accessible routes list or fix the auth check.
In Railway, generate a custom domain for analysis-service (e.g. analysis-service.up.railway.app) and update ANALYSIS_SERVICE_URL in Vercel. The current URL works but is fragile.
Quick Fix — Seed Market Data Now
Run this curl command once to populate the historical_prices table immediately (replace with your Railway market-service URL once it is deployed and you have its domain):
After that succeeds, refresh the app — Market Overview and the homepage banner should resolve automatically without any code changes.
